This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] computed style for ::part()::file-selector-button
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(115, 247, 229)" but got "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)"
[FAIL] computed style for ::part()::placeholder
  assert_equals: expected "rgb(251, 9, 127)" but got "rgb(255, 255, 255)"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
